entities.name: GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: A group of legume crops including chickpea, common bean, cowpea, groundnut, lentil, pigeon pea, and soybean

entities.name: DRYLAND CEREALS
entities.description: A group of cereal crops including finger millet, pearl millet, and sorghum

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: A region where grain legumes and dryland cereals are grown and carbon sequestration is studied

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: A region where grain legumes and dryland cereals are grown and carbon sequestration is studied

entities.name: CARBON SEQUESTRATION
entities.description: The process of capturing and storing atmospheric carbon dioxide in soils and biomass

entities.name: SOIL ORGANIC CARBON
entities.description: Carbon stored in the soil, often abbreviated as SOC

entities.name: ABOVEGROUND CARBON STOCK
entities.description: Carbon stored in the biomass above the soil surface

entities.name: POST-HARVEST RESIDUES
entities.description: Plant material remaining in the field after harvest

entities.name: INTERCROPS
entities.description: The practice of growing two or more crops in proximity

entities.name: LOW INITIAL SOC
entities.description: Soil condition characterized by initial soil organic carbon concentrations of less than 1%

entities.name: HIGH CLAY CONTENT
entities.description: Soil condition characterized by clay content greater than 32%

entities.name: REVIEW STUDY
entities.description: A research approach that quantifies contributions based on a synthesis of existing publications
